---
title: "r"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-22"
---

```{r}
par(mfrow=c(2, 2), cex=0.6, mar=c(4, 4, 1, 1))
y <- rnorm(20)
plot(y, type="p")
plot(y, type="l")
plot(y, type="b")
plot(y, type="h")
```

```{r}
par(mfrow=c(2, 2), cex=0.6, mar=c(4, 4, 4, 2), mex=0.8)
plot(lm.SR <- lm(sr ~ pop15 + pop75 + dpi + ddpi, data = LifeCycleSavings),
     id.n=1)
```
